  4. Q sits between the one who likes Mango and Grapes
options: R's position is third to the right of T
Q sits between the one who likes Mango and Grapes

questionHtml:
Direction: Study the information carefully and answer the given questions. Eight People Ankit, Pankaj, Kuldeep, Navin, Sachin, Ashish , Harish and Ajit are living in an eight-storey building, but not necessarily in the same order. The ground floor is numbered 1 and the floor above it is numbered 2, and so on, until the topmost floor is numbered 8. Kuldeep lives on the lowermost floor. Only three people live between Kuldeep and Ajit . Ankit lives on the 4th floor. Only two people live between Ankit and Pankaj. Only five people live between Navin and Sachin. Harish lives on an odd numbered floor. Only one person lives between Ashish and Navin. Who lives three floors below the one who lives immediately below Pankaj?

  1. Harish
  2. Ankit
  3. Kuldeep
  4. Sachin
subject: Reasoning

More than four people live between Elena and Garima. Bhoomi lives on one of the floors below Garima. Who among the following lives two floors below Arun ?

questionHtml:
Directions: Study the following information to answer the given Questions: Seven persons, X, Y, Z, U, V, W, and T live on different floors of a 7-storey building. The bottommost floor is numbered 1 and the topmost floor is numbered 7. T lives immediately above X, who lives on the 4th floor.Two persons live between X and W. Y lives immediately below V, who lives below T and above W. Who lives on the 2nd floor ?

  1. Y
  2. V
  3. X
  4. W
subject: Reasoning
